_description: Properties shared by Input and Textarea controls

_autocapitalize.desc: Capitalize first letter as you enter

_maxlength.desc: Maximum number of characters for text input. Not used for inputType number.

_minlength.desc: Minimum number of characters for text input. Not used for inputType number.

_bsTextatr: {if autocapitalize==''}autocapitalize=on {/if}{if autocorrect==''}autocorrect=on {/if}{if autocomplete==''}autocomplete=on {/if}{if autocapitalize<>''}autocapitalize={autocapitalize} {/if}{if autocorrect<>''}autocorrect={autocorrect} {/if}{if autocomplete<>''}autocomplete={autocomplete} {/if}spellcheck={spellcheck} {if maxlength<>''}maxlength={maxlength} {/if}{if minlength<>''}minlength={minlength} {/if}{if placeholder<>''}placeholder='{placeholder!b}' {/if}{if readonly<>''}readonly {/if}{if disabled<>''}disabled {/if}{if required<>''}required {/if} data-i18n='{placeholder!b}'
